pulse.name: Pulse
pulse.description: Emits a detection or disruption wave that interacts with hostiles and their equipment. Variants range from passive scanning to active electronic warfare.

scanner.name: Scanner Pulse
scanner.scaling: skill tier (increases scan radius and duration)
scanner.notes: Default starting variant. Highlights all hostiles on HUD in range. Strong in all content for situational awareness.

remote.name: Remote Pulse
remote.scaling: skill tier (increases scan radius and duration)
remote.notes: Deployed as a throwable device rather than a personal pulse. Useful for scanning rooms before entry.

jammer.name: Jammer Pulse
jammer.scaling: skill tier (increases disruption radius and duration)
jammer.notes: Applies Disrupt status to all hostile electronics in radius. Shuts down enemy turrets, drones, and skills. Invaluable in endgame content against Black Tusk.

banshee.name: Banshee Pulse
banshee.scaling: skill tier (increases range and Disorient duration)
banshee.notes: Exclusive to Gunner specialization. Ignores cover geometry and applies Disorient, causing enemies to stumble and fire randomly. Powerful crowd control tool.

achilles.name: Achilles Pulse
achilles.scaling: skill tier (increases damage bonus to marked target)
achilles.notes: Season 4 reward variant. Marks a single target and highlights weakpoints; headshots to weakpoints deal amplified damage. Excellent for boss encounters.

turret.name: Turret
turret.description: A deployable stationary weapon system that automatically targets and engages hostiles. Variants cover multiple damage types from ballistic to incendiary.

assault.name: Assault Turret
assault.scaling: skill tier (increases damage, health, and target acquisition speed)
assault.notes: Armed with an SMG. Most versatile turret variant. Automatically acquires and engages nearby targets. Strong at skill tier 6 where damage becomes significant.

incinerator.name: Incinerator Turret
incinerator.scaling: skill tier (increases burn damage and radius)
incinerator.notes: Short-range flamethrower. Applies Burn status to enemies in cone. Pairs well with fire damage amplification gear. Limited by short range.

sniper.name: Sniper Turret
sniper.scaling: skill tier (increases headshot damage and effective range)
sniper.notes: Manually aimed with marksman rifle. Requires direct player input to fire. Low rate of fire but high single-shot damage. Best used against priority targets.

artillery.name: Artillery Turret
artillery.scaling: skill tier (increases mortar damage and blast radius)
artillery.notes: Exclusive to Demolitionist specialization. Fires explosive mortars at targeted locations. Excellent area denial and AoE damage. The Demolitionist Tactical Link amplifies this.

seeker_mine.name: Seeker Mine
seeker_mine.description: A rolling self-propelled device that seeks out targets or allies. Can deal damage, apply status effects, or provide healing depending on variant.

explosive.name: Explosive Seeker Mine
explosive.scaling: skill tier (increases damage and blast radius)
explosive.notes: Tracks nearest enemy and detonates on contact, also applies Bleed. High burst damage at skill tier 6. Can be combo'd with other status effects for amplified damage.

airburst.name: Airburst Seeker Mine
airburst.scaling: skill tier (increases burn damage and radius)
airburst.notes: Detonates in the air above the target, raining fire and applying Burn to enemies in the affected area. Good for breaking enemy cover.

cluster.name: Cluster Seeker Mine
cluster.scaling: skill tier (increases number of submines and damage per mine)
cluster.notes: Splits into multiple smaller mines that each seek individual targets. Best against tightly grouped enemies. Damage per individual mine is lower than Explosive variant.

mender.name: Mender Seeker Mine
mender.scaling: skill tier (increases armor repaired per tick)
mender.notes: Exclusive to Survivalist specialization. Follows injured allies and releases healing gas to repair armor. Excellent for group content. The Survivalist Tactical Link boosts this further with status effect synergies.

ballistic_shield.name: Ballistic Shield
ballistic_shield.description: A deployable defensive shield that absorbs incoming fire. Variants differ in coverage, weapon compatibility, and offensive capability.

bulwark.name: Bulwark Shield
bulwark.notes: Full-body coverage shield. Restricts user to sidearms only. Highest health pool of non-specialist shields. After the cooldown reduction patch, base cooldown lowered from 240s to 40s.

crusader.name: Crusader Shield
crusader.notes: Allows use of primary weapons while shielding. Head and legs remain exposed. Balances offense and defense. Best choice for players who want shield functionality without giving up primary weapons.

deflector.name: Deflector Shield
deflector.scaling: skill tier (increases reflected damage and shield health)
deflector.notes: Ricochets incoming bullets at highlighted enemy targets. At high skill tier the reflected damage becomes substantial. Unique mechanic that rewards aggressive positioning.

striker.name: Striker Shield
striker.scaling: skill tier (increases damage buff to self and allies)
striker.notes: Exclusive to Firewall specialization. Compatible with the K8-JetStream Flamethrower signature weapon. Provides a stacking damage buff to the user and allies who take cover behind the shield based on enemy count in front.

chem_launcher.name: Chem Launcher
chem_launcher.description: A grenade launcher that fires canisters of chemical payloads. Variants cover support, crowd control, damage over time, and corrosive effects.

reinforcer.name: Reinforcer Chem Launcher
reinforcer.scaling: skill tier (increases armor repair amount per charge)
reinforcer.notes: Fires green canisters that repair and reinforce ally armor on contact. Comes with 3 charges with under 20s cooldown base. Minimum cooldown cap is 8s. Best group support skill in the game.

firestarter.name: Firestarter Chem Launcher
firestarter.scaling: skill tier (increases gas cloud size and burn damage when ignited)
firestarter.notes: Creates an ignitable gas cloud (red canisters). Does not burn on its own — requires ignition from another fire source or a second shot. Pairs with Incinerator Turret or any fire source for devastating combos.

riot_foam.name: Riot Foam Chem Launcher
riot_foam.scaling: skill tier (increases foam duration and radius)
riot_foam.notes: Fires foam that immobilizes targets (applies Ensnare). Dark beige canisters. Excellent for stopping enemy rushes or holding priority targets in place for teammates. Does no direct damage.

oxidizer.name: Oxidizer Chem Launcher
oxidizer.scaling: skill tier (increases corrosive damage and cloud size)
oxidizer.notes: Fires a canister of corrosive chemicals that damages armor and deals damage over time. Particularly effective against heavily armored enemies. Does not apply a discrete status effect but continuously strips armor.

drone.name: Drone
drone.description: An aerial skill device that provides combat or support roles. Variants cover offense, defense, repair, reconnaissance, and bombing.

striker_drone.name: Striker Drone
striker_drone.scaling: skill tier (increases damage per burst and target acquisition speed)
striker_drone.notes: Hovers near player and fires SMG bursts at targeted enemies. One of the strongest DPS skills at skill tier 6. Constantly active during its duration providing supplemental damage.

defender_drone.name: Defender Drone
defender_drone.scaling: skill tier (increases deflection strength and coverage angle)
defender_drone.notes: Uses microwave deflection to redirect incoming projectiles away from the player. Does not absorb but actively deflects. Excellent combined with Ballistic Shield variants for maximum survivability.

bombardier_drone.name: Bombardier Drone
bombardier_drone.scaling: skill tier (increases bomb damage and blast radius)
bombardier_drone.notes: Deploys to a targeted two-point area and drops explosive payloads. High burst AoE capability. Good for clearing grouped enemies and dealing with heavy enemies when combined with skill damage stats.

fixer_drone.name: Fixer Drone
fixer_drone.notes: Hovers near player or ally and continuously repairs armor. Reliable passive healing for solo builds. Less impactful in group play where Reinforcer Chem Launcher may be preferred.

tactician_drone.name: Tactician Drone
tactician_drone.scaling: skill tier (increases mark range and number of targets)
tactician_drone.notes: Exclusive to Sharpshooter specialization. Scouts an area and marks all hostile targets within range. All marked targets take bonus damage from team members. Excellent group synergy skill.

firefly.name: Firefly
firefly.description: A small aerial device launched at a targeted enemy or object. Variants can blind, detonate explosive charges, or destroy weakpoints and skill proxies.

blinder.name: Blinder Firefly
blinder.scaling: skill tier (increases Blind duration and number of targets)
blinder.notes: Applies Blind status effect, preventing enemies from shooting accurately. Good crowd control. At higher skill tiers can target multiple enemies in sequence. Useful in both PvE and PvP.

burster.name: Burster Firefly
burster.scaling: skill tier (increases charge damage and explosion radius)
burster.notes: Attaches multiple explosive charges to the target that detonate simultaneously. High single-target burst damage potential. Pairs well with other debuffs that amplify damage.

demolisher.name: Demolisher Firefly
demolisher.scaling: skill tier (increases weakpoint damage and number of targets)
demolisher.notes: Specifically targets and destroys enemy weakpoints and hostile skill proxies (turrets, drones, etc.). Invaluable for destroying Black Tusk heavy units' weak spots and eliminating enemy deployed skills rapidly.

hive.name: Hive
hive.description: A deployable cluster of micro-drones placed on the ground. Variants provide repair, attack, revival, buffs, or skill enhancement depending on configuration.

restorer.name: Restorer Hive
restorer.scaling: skill tier (increases repair amount per drone and drone count)
restorer.notes: Deploys repair micro-drones that fly to injured allies in range and restore armor. Reliable AoE armor repair. Place near chokepoints for consistent group sustain.

stinger.name: Stinger Hive
stinger.scaling: skill tier (increases damage per sting and drone speed)
stinger.notes: Deploys attack drones that sting approaching enemies, applying Bleed and disrupting their actions. Enemies under attack from the hive are prevented from effectively attacking. Good defensive perimeter tool. Drone speed gains +5% per skill tier.

reviver.name: Reviver Hive
reviver.scaling: skill tier (increases revive speed and number of charges)
reviver.notes: Revives downed allies within radius. Base cooldown was reduced from 240s to 180s in a prior patch. Can be set up to self-revive when downed. Nearly mandatory skill in challenging group content.

booster.name: Booster Hive
booster.scaling: skill tier (increases buff strength, adds +4 charges per tier)
booster.notes: Releases stimulant that buffs weapon handling, melee damage, and hazard protection for 20 seconds. Buff amount increased from +10% to +20% at skill tier 0 in a balance patch. Gains +4 charges per skill tier.

artificer.name: Artificer Hive
artificer.scaling: skill tier (increases skill efficiency bonus and duration)
artificer.notes: Exclusive to Technician specialization. Boosts the skill efficiency of all friendly skill proxies in range, increasing their damage output, repair amounts, and other stats. Stacks with Emergency Patch talent from Technician tree.

sticky_bomb.name: Sticky Bomb
sticky_bomb.description: A Warlords of New York skill that launches an adhesive explosive payload. Functions as a targeted grenade alternative that sticks to surfaces and enemies before remote detonation.

burn.name: Sticky Bomb (Burn)
burn.scaling: skill tier (increases burn damage and duration)
burn.notes: Sticks to target then detonates to create a persistent flame. Base damage approximately 1,094,977. Applies continuous Burn. Best used by sticking directly to enemies before detonation for maximum effect.

emp.name: Sticky Bomb (EMP)
emp.scaling: skill tier (increases disruption radius and duration)
emp.notes: Adheres to target then detonates as a large EMP blast with 4-meter radius, applying Disrupt to all affected electronics and enemies. Shorter cooldown than other variants. Excellent against Black Tusk faction.

explosive.name: Sticky Bomb (Explosive)
explosive.scaling: skill tier (increases damage and blast radius)
explosive.notes: Causes panic and high impact damage with 3-meter blast radius. Base damage approximately 1,459,970. Stick directly to enemy for full damage. Causes Panic status effect on nearby enemies in blast radius.

trap.name: Trap
trap.description: A Warlords of New York skill that scatters a minefield of small devices across an area. Variants trigger on enemy proximity or provide healing to allies.

shock_trap.name: Shock Trap
shock_trap.scaling: skill tier (increases shock duration and number of mines deployed)
shock_trap.notes: Scatters electric mines that shock approaching enemies. Shocked targets are forced out of cover and move slowly. Excellent for denying chokepoints. Applies Shock status effect causing enemies to stumble and become vulnerable.

repair_trap.name: Repair Trap
repair_trap.scaling: skill tier (increases armor repair amount per mine)
repair_trap.notes: Scatters repair mines that activate when friendly agents walk over them, repairing armor. When in Overcharge mode (triggered by Technician Artificer Hive), grants Status Effect Immunity for 10 seconds to triggered allies.

decoy.name: Decoy
decoy.description: A Warlords of New York skill that projects a holographic distraction designed to draw hostile attention away from the player and their team.

holographic.name: Holographic Decoy
holographic.scaling: skill tier (increases decoy health and distraction duration)
holographic.notes: Creates a lifelike holographic projection that draws hostile AI and skill proxies (turrets, homing mines) away from the player. AI enemies and enemy homing skills automatically target the Decoy over real players. Invaluable for repositioning under fire or solo play survivability.

smart_cover.name: Smart Cover
smart_cover.description: A Battle for Brooklyn skill that deploys a small device onto a surface that creates an enhanced cover zone. Variants offer either survivability or damage amplification.

fortified.name: Fortified Smart Cover
fortified.scaling: skill tier (increases bonus armor percentage and resistance values)
fortified.notes: Sticks to a surface and enhances survivability for agents using that cover, granting Bonus Armor, Pulse Resistance, and Explosive Resistance. Excellent for defending a position in endgame content.

precision.name: Precision Smart Cover
precision.scaling: skill tier (increases damage bonus and weapon handling bonus)
precision.notes: Sticks to a surface and enhances damage potential for agents in cover range, granting additional Weapon Handling and Damage to Targets Out of Cover. Best paired with builds that frequently engage targets out of cover.
